title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Sobha Developers

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Sobha Developers
jsonLd.description:
We at Sobha Developers are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sobha Developers:
Sobha Developers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sobha Developers!
